title: AI Celebrity Red Carpet
description: Uses the default AI provider to stage a photo as a glamorous red carpet appearance.
positive_prompt: Luxury celebrity red carpet appearance, glamorous movie premiere, flashing paparazzi cameras, elegant formal outfit, confident pose, cinematic lighting, luxury event atmosphere, high-end fashion photography, shallow depth of field, realistic skin details, prestigious Hollywood event, professional portrait, dramatic lighting, premium editorial quality, crowd and photographers in background, ultra realistic, award ceremony style
negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, low quality, blurry, amateur photography, distorted face, extra limbs, extra fingers, duplicate person, bad anatomy, watermark, logo, text, casual clothes, empty background, poor lighting, overexposed, underexposed, pixelated, CGI, unrealistic skin, horror elements, cropped body, motion blur
